{{CargoRelic
|name=Otzi
|class_id=22570
|rank=AA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=09-19
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.12%)
|description=On Sept 19, 1990 AD, a German couple discovered the body while hiking in the Alps.<br>Otzi the Iceman is a well-preserved naturally mummified corpse that was named after the valley where it was found. The first tourists who found it thought it was a modern person's corpse, but the Austrian authorities sent the Iceman for analysis and discovered that it came from five thousand years ago, making it the oldest mummy to date.
|fame=47
|art=43
|fth=39
|civ=70
|tech=29
|ss1=Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail HP +20<br>Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +2<br>Surf Clams Calculation: 50/50
|ss2=Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail HP +30<br>Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +3<br>Surf Clams Calculation: 50/50
|ss3=Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail HP +40<br>Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +4<br>Surf Clams Calculation: 50/50
|ss4=Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail HP +60<br>Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +6<br>Surf Clams Calculation: 50/50
|ss5=Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail HP +80<br>Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +8<br>Surf Clams Calculation: 50/50
|ss7=Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail HP +80<br>Per Surf Clams Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +8<br>Surf Clams Calculation: 50/50<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's CIV +10
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Purple Card Drops +3%
}}
